message: Add settings modal and message color customization  Introduce a Settings modal to change chat message color and related UI tweaks. Added changeColor/openSettings/closeSettings functions and an outside-click handler in static/chat.js, and updated message classification to treat lines starting with

as server messages. Added CSS variable --message-color, modal styles, reduced message max-width and enabled overflow-wrap in static/styles.css. Populated rooms/general.txt with sample chat history for testing and added a new user (admin2) to users.json.
